headlines.title: OPEC Sees Oil Demand Growth Outpacing Supply Through 2027

headlines.title: Britain’s Electric Vehicle Market Is Booming as Fuel Prices Climb
headlines.summary: Brits are racing to get their hands on electric vehicles after a surge in oil prices triggered by the war in Iran has driven away demand for petrol and diesel cars, one of the UK’s biggest used car supermarkets has said. headlines.title: Oil Held the Biggest IPO Record. Tonight It Loses the Crown.

headlines.title: China Is Learning to Use Less Oil—and That's a Bigger Deal Than It Sounds
headlines.summary: Three months into the biggest oil supply disruption in modern history, China appears to have discovered something that should make oil bulls at least a little uncomfortable. headlines.title: Sanctioned Private Chinese Refiner Seeks Non-Iranian Crude
headlines.summary: Hengli Petrochemical, the privately-owned Chinese refiner that was sanctioned by the U.S. in April over allegedly buying Iranian oil, is looking to buy crude from other Middle Eastern producers and West Africa, Reuters reported on Thursday, citing trade sources.
